name: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated
description: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (PSEG) is a diversified energy company headquartered in Newark, New Jersey. Its primary subsidiaries include Public Service Electric and Gas Company (PSE&G), a regulated utility serving millions of customers in New Jersey, and PSEG Power, which operates a diverse fleet of power generation assets. PSEG is a major producer of carbon-free energy, particularly through its significant nuclear power operations, and is committed to a clean energy future through investments in transmission, solar energy, and energy efficiency programs.
